summary: Improve configuration-center and approval-center interaction performance without splitting APIs.

notes: No database migration is included in this release.
Project configuration now filters already-loaded role requirements locally when service type changes.
Project saves optimistically patch project list caches and defer heavy approval/report/dashboard refreshes.
Approval actions now refresh approval data and the affected timesheet detail first, with report/dashboard calibration delayed in the background.
Desktop and mobile approval centers use row-level pending state so one action does not disable the whole list.
Realtime project and approval events no longer immediately fan out to report/dashboard refreshes.

verification: Run npm --prefix frontend run build with production Vite variables and VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.18.7.
Run deploy/scripts/verify-jwt-keys.sh on the cloud host.
Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on the cloud host before deployment.
After deploy, run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.7.
After deploy, run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against https://xpjs.asia/ with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.7.
known_warnings: Vite still warns that some chunks are larger than 500 kB.
